args.query:
SELECT track_id, source_id, source_track_id, title, artist, album, year, length, language
FROM tracks
WHERE lower(artist) LIKE '%brucqe maginnis%'
  AND lower(title) LIKE '%street hype%';

exec_args.sql:
SELECT track_id, source_id, source_track_id, title, artist, album, year, length, language
FROM tracks
WHERE lower(artist) LIKE '%brucqe maginnis%'
  AND lower(title) LIKE '%street hype%';

args.query:
SELECT track_id, source_id, source_track_id, title, artist, album, year, length, language
FROM tracks
WHERE lower(title) LIKE '%street hype%'
LIMIT 200;

args.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n_sales, COUNT(DISTINCT track_id) AS n_track_ids FROM sales;

exec_args.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n_sales, COUNT(DISTINCT track_id) AS n_track_ids FROM sales;

args.query:
SELECT store, SUM(revenue_usd) AS revenue
FROM sales
GROUP BY store
ORDER BY revenue DESC;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT store, SUM(revenue_usd) AS revenue
FROM sales
GROUP BY store
ORDER BY revenue DESC;

args.query:
SELECT country, store, SUM(revenue_usd) AS revenue
FROM sales
GROUP BY country, store
ORDER BY revenue DESC
LIMIT 50;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT country, store, SUM(revenue_usd) AS revenue
FROM sales
GROUP BY country, store
ORDER BY revenue DESC
LIMIT 50;

args.query:
SELECT store, SUM(revenue_usd) AS revenue_usd
FROM sales
WHERE track_id IN (4122,4628,13758,14080)
GROUP BY store
ORDER BY revenue_usd DESC;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT store, SUM(revenue_usd) AS revenue_usd
FROM sales
WHERE track_id IN (4122,4628,13758,14080)
GROUP BY store
ORDER BY revenue_usd DESC;
